A submarine swap is a type of cryptocurrency swap where a user exchanges their cryptocurrency (like Bitcoin) for another asset, such as Tether (USDT) or XAU (Tether Gold). The purpose is to move funds from one asset to another, similar to a Bitcoin swap. For example, if you want to convert 1 BTC to USDT, you would place an order to receive 1 BTC-sats and pay 0.063176 USDT in exchange. The exact terms depend on the specific swap and the assets involved.
